case_title: O'NEILL, ANTOINETTE VS MURPHY, DENNIS T.-MURPHY INVESTMENTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $601.52 FILED BY O'NEILL, ANTOINETTE AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, DENNIS T.-MURPHY INVESTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
